summary: quickstart.sh structure is orderly but the flow is incomplete/misleading; CLI detection/install logic appears wrong for modern Copilot CLI; skill-only install leaves system unusable; guidance/errors need fixes.
findings: Structure: logical order with strict mode and exec; uses non-atomic curl write for SKILL.md but otherwise clean.

CLI detection/install: checks only standalone copilot; uses invalid install paths (brew install copilot-cli, gh.io/copilot-install, winget GitHub.Copilot) and ignores gh copilot extension; exec copilot will fail for gh copilot.
Skill addition: only downloads skills/SKILL.md; does not install agents (stampede-agent/commander/merger) or shell scripts (stampede.sh/monitor/merge); no chmod or ~/bin PATH handling.
User guidance: says type stampede but correct usage is run stampede "task"; no next-step examples; no mention that only skill is installed.
Errors: fallback message installed can be misleading; failure hints suggest brew even on Linux; no interactive TTY guard before exec.
recommendations: Update quickstart to install full runtime (agents + scripts) or clearly state it is skill-only and direct users to install.sh for full setup.
Fix Copilot CLI detection to prefer gh copilot extension and correct install steps (brew install gh + gh extension install github/gh-copilot).
Adjust guidance to use run stampede "task" and add next-step examples (status/merge).
Improve error messaging by branching per install path and add a TTY check before exec.
